## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `cd route-planner && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (standard library only)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data committed (API keys, `rider-profile.json`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (`SKILL.md`, `references/*.md`, root docs)
- [ ] Rebuilt `route-planner.skill` if the skill folder changed
